title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Niva Bupa

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Niva Bupa
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, Niva Bupa in Jaipur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Niva Bupa:
Niva Bupa is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Niva Bupa!
